findings.description: Missing notable property names from the attributes table: infoCss, warnCss, errorCss. These are distinct CSS class attributes (for info-level, warning-level, and error-level messages respectively) that users may query by name.
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists: infoCss (デフォルトは"nablarch_info")、warnCss (デフォルトは"nablarch_warn")、errorCss (デフォルトは"nablarch_error")

findings.description: Missing hints for optionColumnName and pattern. optionColumnName is particularly notable because it is cross-referenced in the labelPattern explanation ($OPTIONALNAME$を使用する場合は、optionColumnName属性の指定が必須).
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists optionColumnName and pattern as distinct attributes. The labelPattern description explicitly calls out: "$OPTIONALNAME$を使用する場合は、optionColumnName属性の指定が必須となる"

findings.description: Missing hints for optionColumnName and pattern. Same cross-reference as codeSelectタグ: optionColumnName is required when using $OPTIONALNAME$ in labelPattern.
findings.source_evidence: Source table lists optionColumnName and pattern as distinct attributes with the same $OPTIONALNAME$ constraint note as codeSelectタグ.
